query: SELECT pa.id, pa.originalProductId, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.batchNo') AS batchNo, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productCode') AS productCode, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.serialNumber') AS serialNumber, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.imei') AS imei, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.categoryId') AS categoryId, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.stationCode') AS stationCode, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productStatus') AS productStatus, pa.archiveMonth, pa.createdAt FROM product_archives pa WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.batchNo')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productCode')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.serialNumber')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.imei')) = '1.01300001569' ORDER BY pa.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT pa.id, pa.originalProductId, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.batchNo') AS batchNo, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productCode') AS productCode, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.serialNumber') AS serialNumber, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.imei') AS imei, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.categoryId') AS categoryId, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.stationCode') AS stationCode, JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productStatus') AS productStatus, pa.archiveMonth, pa.createdAt FROM product_archives pa WHERE JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.batchNo')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.productCode')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.serialNumber')) = '1.01300001569' OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(pa.productSnapshot, '$.imei')) = '1.01300001569' ORDER BY pa.id DESC LIMIT 20;
